heading: Power to remove directors and officers
label: 2274 Power to remove directors and officers
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, a Farm Credit Bank board, officer, or employee shall not remove any director or officer of any association.
notes: Amendments2018— substituted “a Farm Credit Bank board, officer, or employee shall not remove any director or officer of any” for “a farm credit district board, bank board, or bank officer or employee shall not remove any director or officer of any production credit association or Federal land bank”.Pub. L. 115–334
amendments: Amendments2018— substituted “a Farm Credit Bank board, officer, or employee shall not remove any director or officer of any” for “a farm credit district board, bank board, or bank officer or employee shall not remove any director or officer of any production credit association or Federal land bank”.Pub. L. 115–334
